chunks.text:
# Beat a Leak Plumbing

## About
Beat a Leak Plumbing is a professional plumbing service company based in Blacktown, NSW, Australia, serving the Blacktown area and surrounding suburbs. They provide expert plumbing solutions for both residential and commercial clients.

## Services
- **Residential Plumbing** — Full range of residential plumbing services
- **Commercial Plumbing** — Commercial plumbing solutions
- **Gas Fitting & Water Heating** — Gas fitting services and water heater installation/repair
- **Hot Water Systems** — Installation, repair and replacement of hot water systems
- **Bathroom Renovations** — Complete bathroom renovation services
- **Kitchen Renovations** — Kitchen plumbing and renovation work
- **Drain Clearing** — Professional drain clearing and unblocking
- **Emergency Plumbing** — 24-hour emergency plumbing services available

## Products & Pricing
All tapware comes with a 15-year warranty, is chrome plated, and Australian made.

| Product | Price |
|---------|-------|
| Easy clean basin set and spout — supply and install (ECLQTBSAGC) | $399. 00 |
| Easy clean basin set and spout — supply and install (ECLQTBSAGSC) | $350. 00 |
| ¼ Turn lever wall set — supply and install (ECLQTWSC) | $330. 00 |
| Easy clean cross wall stop ¾ turn — supply and install (ECTWSCP) | $299. 00 |
| Ridge sink mixer 220mm — supply and install (RILSSM) | $363. 00 |
| Ridge vegetable spray and mixer — supply and install (RILSSMV) | $450.

00 |

## Contact Information
- **Phone:** 0405 113 587
- **Email:** Beataleakplumbing@gmail. com
- **Address:** 30 Archer St, Blacktown NSW 2148, Australia
- **Service Area:** Blacktown, NSW & Surrounding Areas
- **Website:** https://beataleakplumbing. com. au
- **Availability:** 24/7 Emergency Service Available

## Key Features
- Expert Blacktown plumbers
- 24-hour emergency service
- Residential and commercial
- Australian-made products with 15-year warranty
- Licensed and professional.
